variants: Eloise Beaurivage currently resides at Coralshade Promenade, where she works with Yonder Isle Expeditions in her pursuit of oceanic discovery. Born in Cometfield Bend, her innovative nature brought forth the Nebula Weave Filter, a groundbreaking invention that has transformed underwater exploration. Her contributions to this field did not go unnoticed, earning her the prestigious Legacy Aegis Insignia, a commendation that reflects her dedication and excellence. With a lifelong commitment to marine exploration, Eloise inspires those around her to connect with the underwater world.
